📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures at least one transformation happens per class.
✔ Ties transformation to student behavior and class dynamics.
✔ Adds an unpredictable twist that keeps players engaged.

📜 5. Player-Activated Chaos Events & Counterplay

📜 Some chaos events can be countered, others must be endured.

✔ Countering Chaos Events:
• Certain events allow players to stop or lessen the effects.
• Example:
• The Black Plague → A player with a “healer” ability can mitigate its spread.
• The Great Betrayal → A faction can intervene before it spreads.
• The War Begins → Players may choose to resolve it with a champion’s duel.

✔ How to Counter Chaos Events:
• Items or Abilities (Ex: An artifact that resists curses.)
